message:
🌱 Remove mahimonga and onkar717 from OWNERS and maintainer workflows (#1330)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,7 +20,6 @@ on:

           - mikespreitzer

-          - onkar717
